blazor_pages.component: {'description': 'Returns activity log entries for a specific object (e.g. all activity for FtpSetting Id=42). Optional maxRecords limits response. Used by admin UI to show change history per entity.', 'name': 'GetActivityLogs', 'signature': 'GetActivityLogsAsync(type, objectId, maxRecordsToReturn) → IReadOnlyCollection<ActivityLogReadModel>', 'trigger': 'Admin UI requests history for a data object.', 'data': ['ActivityLogs', 'ActivityLogEntries', 'ActivityLogEntryTypes']}

rules: if truly empty (use empty list, not null).
must be plain English or well-known identifiers.
{'detail': 'All activity tracked belongs to customer-owned objects. objectId references the entity primary key (e.g. FtpSettingId, DataImportFileId).', 'rule': 'Activity log is customer-scoped'}

{'detail': 'Enum: None, Broadcast, SubscriptionsImport, PositiveListsImport, StandardReceiversImport. Only these four (+ None) are valid activity types. Not extensible without code change.', 'rule': 'ActivityLogType is a bounded enum'}

{'detail': 'One ActivityLog parent row per (type, objectId). Multiple ActivityLogEntry children per event. Parent is created on first entry.', 'rule': 'ActivityLog is per-object — ActivityLogEntries are per-event'}

{'detail': 'The description stored is a locale resource KEY — not a pre-translated string. The admin UI calls ILocalizationService.GetLocalizedResource(key, languageId) at display time.', 'rule': 'descriptionTranslationKey is displayed via localization'}
